visual_description: A high-angle, static shot captures a group of men in a modern office meeting room. In the center of the frame, a man in a white, short-sleeved uniform shirt with a tie stands with his arms crossed, addressing the others. He appears to be in a position of authority. Seated around a large, dark grey conference table are four other men, also in various uniforms. They are listening attentively, some with their hands clasped on the table, which is covered with papers, mugs, and a black cap. To the left of the group, an older man in a light blue shirt looks down at his papers. In the background, a staircase is visible through a glass partition, and a television on a stand displays a blue and white graphic. The room has a tiled floor with a black and white pattern. In the top left corner of the screen, there is a watermark with Chinese characters. The camera remains stationary throughout the clip. A man speaks in a firm, authoritative voice, giving a clear instruction. His tone is serious and commanding as he says, "你们要办得风光一点，知道吗？" (You need to handle this with more dignity, understand?).
